rows.content: USER ID+- This field allows you to set up the user ID that SPF/PC
displays on the Primary Option Panel.  This is an informational
field, it has no effect on processing.
COMMAND DELIMITER+- Type in the character that you want to use to
separate stacked commands.  This character separates commands in a
command string.  The default is a semicolon (;), which should only
SCREEN LINES+- Specify the number of lines that you want displayed for
Dialog Manager Panels and Text Browse and Edit. Typical numbers are
25, 43, and 50. Any value that is valid for the operating system
video mode is supported. If you specify an invalid value, SPF/PC sets
the video mode to the nearest legitimate value.
If 0 is specified, SPF/PC the video mode is not changed.
